channel.title: 🏫 Uni Stuff on Jonas B. Skånøy
channel.description: Recent content in 🏫 Uni Stuff on Jonas B. Skånøy

item.title: My thoughts on this semester.
item.description: 1 This semester is going to be my final one as a bachelor student in philosophy! Am very excited to get started, and whilst what comes after is uncertain, I am very grateful for the chance I’ve been given to actually just study something for the sake of liking the subject. I am grateful for having a stable and safe family dynamic, who I can rely on both emotionally, but also with regards to practical manners.
